---
title: "\'Three Generations- Crude Girlhood\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'Three Generations- Crude Girlhood\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1895
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Short Story in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 5:20 (October 1895) 217-226

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
